title: narcissus similis
intro: Narcissus similis, also known as the 'poet's narcissus', is a species of flowering plant in the genus Narcissus. It is known for its small, white flowers and its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is used to treat a variety of health issues, including bronchitis, coughs, and skin conditions, due to its antimicrobial and expectorant properties. Herbal preparations of Narcissus similis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat respiratory issues and promote overall health and well-being.
